poster_title: A Comprehensive Survey of Reward Models: Taxonomy, Applications, Challenges, and Future
authors: Jialun Zhong, Wei Shen, Yanzeng Li, Songyang Gao, Hua Lu, Yicheng Chen, Yang Zhang, Wei Zhou, Jinjie Gu, Lei Zou

content: First comprehensive survey on Reward Models (RMs) in the LLM era.
Covers taxonomy, applications, challenges, and future directions.
Provides a foundation for researchers and beginners.
Rapid development in Large Language Models (LLMs).
Enhanced AI community and driven progress in various tasks.
RMs trained on human preference data guide reinforcement learning.
Lack of systematic organization of RMs in existing surveys.
Efficiency and quality issues in preference collection.
High costs and practical limitations of human annotators.
Introduce a detailed taxonomy of RMs.
Discuss challenges and propose research directions.
Challenges identified: efficiency, quality, and AI preferences.
panels.figure_caption: Example of a Reward Model (RM) in the survey.

content: RMs have significant potential in aligning LLMs with human values.
Systematic organization and detailed discussions are essential.
Survey provides a foundation for further research.

Fig8.caption: Figure 1: An example of RM.
Fig8.description: 示例图展示了 RM 的一个具体实例，但图注信息不足，无法确定具体细节。
